prompt: A premium fast-food commercial product photograph of a gourmet cheeseburger centered against a warm golden-yellow seamless studio background. The burger features a glossy sesame seed bun, fresh lettuce, tomato slices, onion rings, melted cheese, a juicy grilled beef patty, and rich sauce. Soft studio lighting, subtle shadows, mouthwatering texture, sharp focus, ultra realistic food advertisement photography, clean composition, 8K. Create a hyper-realistic exploded vertical infographic composition of a gourmet cheeseburger. At the top, a glossy sesame seed bun top with crisp texture. Below it, fresh green lettuce leaves, tomato slices, onion rings, melted cheese, a juicy grilled beef patty, a sauce layer, and a soft bun base. All ingredients are evenly spaced and perfectly aligned vertically. Warm yellow seamless studio background, soft commercial food lighting, subtle realistic shadows under each floating element, ultra-sharp focus, DSLR macro food photography, premium fast-food ad aesthetic, 8K. Add clean infographic text labels with thin pointer lines pointing to each element using these exact labels: “Bun Top” “Lettuce” “Tomato” “Onion” “Cheese” “Patty” “Sauce” “Bun Base”
translatedPrompt: 一张高端快餐商业产品摄影照片，主体为居中的精品芝士汉堡，背景为温暖的金色无缝摄影棚背景。汉堡配有光泽感的芝麻面包、新鲜生菜、番茄片、洋葱圈、融化的芝士、多汁的烤牛肉饼和浓郁的酱汁。柔和的摄影棚灯光，细腻的阴影，令人垂涎的质感，焦点清晰，超写实美食广告摄影，构图简洁，8K 分辨率。创建一个超写实的精品芝士汉堡垂直爆炸式信息图构图。顶部是质感酥脆的光泽感芝麻面包顶，下方依次为新鲜的绿色生菜叶、番茄片、洋葱圈、融化的芝士、多汁的烤牛肉饼、酱汁层以及柔软的面包底。所有食材均匀分布并完美垂直对齐。温暖的黄色无缝摄影棚背景，柔和的商业美食灯光，每个悬浮元素下方带有细腻逼真的阴影，超清晰对焦，DSLR 微距美食摄影，高端快餐广告美学，8K 分辨率。添加简洁的信息图文字标签，并使用细引线指向每个元素，标签名称如下：“Bun Top”、“Lettuce”、“Tomato”、“Onion”、“Cheese”、“Patty”、“Sauce”、“Bun Base”

breakdown.creativeCore: 精品汉堡商业摄影：一份用于精品芝士汉堡的专业美食摄影提示词，包含一个爆炸视图信息图版本。
breakdown.subject: 信息结构
breakdown.text: 要求精确文字；包含标注/说明
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 产品首图、广告图、电商详情页首屏

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 产品/电商 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered, vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, premium, studio]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: studio lighting]。

Text requirements:
要求精确文字；包含标注/说明。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
